title: ShieldFixes-Server
description: Fixes the shield animation and sound glitch
body:
Fixes shield animation and sound bugs server-side, functions like the [Shield Fixes](https://modrinth.com/mod/complete-shield-fixes) mod ![Blocking fix showcase](https://i.imgur.com/jtq1FD7.gif) Requires [PacketEvents](https://modrinth.com/plugin/packetevents) and spigot or a fork of spigot 1.19.4+ Fixes:
https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-105068
https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-238293
